company_name: Malomatia India Technology Services Pvt. Ltd.
drive_dates: Between 1 st or 2 nd week of November
date_of_joining: January '26 onwards (Leaves will be provided for the examinations as per company policy)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months Internship / training (for B.Tech / MCA) : 25 K per month Salary after 6 months Internship / training will be as under (on confirmation) : → for B.E / B.Tech : CTC 6.25 LPA → for MCA : CTC 5.50 LPA
package_salary.bond: 2 Year’s Bond (If the students breaks the bond within two years of joining shall be liable for 2 lacs)

selection_process_steps: required to undergo an online assessment test.
clear the assessment will proceed to the interview round.
who successfully clear the interview will be considered for final onboarding.
